title: Inaccurate AVG of SQRT with 51M records
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO large_data SELECT ROUND(RAND() * 100, 2) FROM (SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10) AS numbers LIMIT 51000000;
SELECT AVG(SQRT(value)) FROM large_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_data SELECT SQRT(value) FROM large_data WHERE value > 0;
key_bug_features: Inaccurate AVG calculation for SQRT with large datasets
